title: Days Gone By
description:
Legacy blocks from long-forgotten versions~
Now compatible with Sinytra Connector & Forgified Fabric API.
body:
Blocks from old versions of the game, lost to time... _Until now._
Experience that 2011 nostalgia once more! Recreate old maps* with sand-gravel doors and the Gear blocks! Gaze in awe at the mysterious Cyan Flower! _*Temple of Notch sold separately_
